context: Evaluates the affordabot pipeline observability implementation. Checks that create/complete/fail database operations use the correct status values and return types, and that the admin API route returns full run details.

checklist.name: create_pipeline_run initial status
checklist.description: create_pipeline_run() inserts a record with status='running' and returns the run_id string.

checklist.name: complete_pipeline_run status update
checklist.description: complete_pipeline_run() sets status='completed', stores the result payload, and returns True.

checklist.name: fail_pipeline_run status update
checklist.description: fail_pipeline_run() sets status='failed', records the error string, and returns True.

checklist.name: GET /api/pipeline-runs/{run_id} response
checklist.description: The route returns a response containing the run record with status, result or error, and associated pipeline steps.

checklist.name: Run not found 404
checklist.description: GET /api/pipeline-runs/{run_id} returns HTTP 404 when no run exists with the given run_id.
